ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. MATTER CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 22, 2021 AT 3:30 P.M. IF NO APPEARANCE MATTER DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED.
EXHIBITS RECEIVED ON JAN-22-2021 BY DROPBOX (HEARING SET FOR JAN-22-21 @ 3:30PM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FURGASON, HOLLY
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,975.00 FILED BY FURGASON, HOLLY AS TO DEFENDANT EXTRA SPACE MANAGEMENT, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (HEARING SET FOR JAN-21-21 AT 3:30PM) (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FURGASON, HOLLY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-22-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-22-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DISCLOSURE IS MADE. PLAINTIFF HOLLY FURGASON IS PRESENT VIA COURTCALL. DEFENDANT EXTRA SPACE MANAGEMENT, INC IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS: GRANTED.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
